## Verification

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (state your OS and Node version)
- [ ] `node bin/autodev.js selftest` passes
- [ ] Regression test added, and it fails without the fix
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies
- [ ] No shell strings, POSIX-only paths, or fixed-sleep timing added
- [ ] README/CHANGELOG updated if this makes a documented claim true or false
